chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1213 of 2019 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.6564/2025 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. The learned counsel for the petitioner has filed an application seeking urgent hearing of the matter. For the reasons stated therein, the same is allowed. 2. Accordingly, the matter has been taken up for hearing today. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitution Petition. Consequently, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
